sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 81

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 81:1
items.html:
(to the question) AB KDM
The fallen AHP of every Partzuf, which are returned to it at the time of Gadlut through the illumination of the Zivug of AB-SAG and become its Achoraim — that is, its new NHY — are alluded to in the Gematria AB KDM, which is the discernment of the two Achoraim of Rosh and Guf. For the simple HaVaYaH is the discernment of the Rosh, whose square and Achoraim — Yod; Yod-Hey; Yod-Hey-Vav; Yod-Hey-Vav-Hey — are AB [72] in Gematria. And HaVaYaH with the filling of BON is the discernment of the Guf, whose Achoraim, alluded to in the square — Yod; Yod, Hey-Hey; Yod, Hey-Hey, Vav-Vav; Yod, Hey-Hey, Vav-Vav, Hey-Hey — are KDM [144] in Gematria. Together they are RIV [216] in Gematria. And they are the vessel that raises the MAN, which comes with the first coming. (Item 10)
